case_title: ZHOU, SHA VS THE STUDENT LOAN CENTER WELLS FARGO BANK et al

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY ZHOU, SHA AS TO DEFENDANT THE STUDENT LOAN CENTER  WELLS FARGO BANK EDUSERV TECHNOLOGIES, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-03-1994 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 01
CERTIFIED MAIL TO ARBEE LOWRENCE WELLS FARGO BANK RETURNED SIGNED
CERT MAIL TO KATHY TATUM RETURNED SIGNED.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-03-1994, CONTINUED BY COURT TO NOV-14-1994 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 01

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ZHOU, SHA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT THE STUDENT LOAN CENTER  WELLS FARGO BANK EDUSERV TECHNOLOGIES, INC. IT IS UNDERSTOOD THAT THE TERMS STATED IN LETTER DATED 11/9/94 FROM CHELA WILL STILL BE FOLLOWED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
